# Flash Legal Funding — robots.txt
# Default: allow all well-behaved crawlers
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /_site/

# --- Search engines (explicit allow) ---
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: DuckDuckBot
Allow: /

# --- AI crawlers (explicit opt-in) ---
# Anthropic
User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

# OpenAI
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

# Google AI / Gemini training opt-in
User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

# Perplexity
User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Perplexity-User
Allow: /

# Common Crawl (feeds many AI training sets)
User-agent: CCBot
Allow: /

# Apple
User-agent: Applebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Applebot-Extended
Allow: /

# Meta
User-agent: Meta-ExternalAgent
Allow: /

User-agent: FacebookBot
Allow: /

# ByteDance
User-agent: Bytespider
Allow: /

# Mistral
User-agent: MistralAI-User

# Cohere
User-agent: cohere-ai
Allow: /

# AI training/inference preferences (Spawning ai.txt spec):
